entries.quote: AI is the most transformational technology I have seen in my lifetime and India will be where some of its most important applications are built.
entries.signal: Amazon is positioning India as an AI builder nation, not just a consumer market — signalling deeper platform investment beyond ecommerce.
entries.belief: [Inferred · High] Management believes India's engineering talent and digital adoption rate make it a primary innovation hub, justifying the $35B multi-year commitment.

entries.quote: Rewards should be simple, transparent, and help our customers save big. Rewards Gold is designed to reward regular users every time they spend.
entries.signal: Amazon Pay is positioning simplicity and transparency as core loyalty values — a deliberate contrast to complex points-and-voucher systems.
entries.belief: [Inferred · Medium] Management believes volume-based qualification will drive habitual daily use without requiring unsustainable blanket cashback, protecting unit economics while growing engagement.
